info.title: A fatal error was encountered. The library 'libhostpolicy.so' required to execute the application was not found in '/usr/share/dotnet'.
info.description:

- If this should be a framework-dependent app, add the '/tmp/inspectra-help-githubdonwloader-1.0.0-0aaeefd2f4294027985d70c2e13ba2e8/tool/.store/githubdonwloader/1.0.0/githubdonwloader/1.0.0/tools/net7.0/any/GithubDonwloader.runtimeconfig.json' file and specify the appropriate framework.
